diagrams.title: Logging Architecture Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how log messages flow from application code through logger, formatter, and appender to final destination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the components of a logging system and their interactions

diagrams.title: Log Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchical representation of log levels from most verbose (bottom) to most critical (top)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing log level severity and verbosity relationship

diagrams.title: Stack Trace Example
diagrams.description: Sample stack trace showing exception propagation with file names, line numbers, and method names
diagrams.purpose: Learning to read and interpret stack traces for debugging

diagrams.title: Centralized Logging Architecture
diagrams.description: Diagram showing multiple applications sending logs to a centralized logging system
diagrams.purpose: Understanding distributed logging in microservices environments
